macro.title: Eli Lilly’s $3.25 billion acquisition of Kelonia Therapeutics caps startup’s tortuous ride - statnews.com
macro.summary: Kelonia Therapeutics, a small biotech company, long struggled to stay afloat. Now it's been acquired by Eli Lilly for $3.25 billion.

macro.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Close Lower; Oil Climbs as Tensions in Gulf Continue — Live Updates - WSJ
Amazon and Anthropic expand strategic collaboration - About Amazon
macro.summary: As part of the expanded strategic collaboration, Anthropic will secure up to 5GW of Amazon Trainium chips and commit $100B to AWS technologies over a decade.

macro.title: Blue Origin Botched a Satellite Launch, but AST SpaceMobile Stock Is Paying the Price - Barron's
macro.summary: AST SpaceMobile stock is in focus after a satellite carried by a Blue Origin rocket was put into an incorrect position on Sunday.
